---
title: "Check Primate species with Fibroblasts"
output: html_notebook
---


Check availability of Fibroblast lines for Wolfi

```{r,message=F,warning=F}


library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)

theme_set(theme_classic())

here::here()

path<-here::here()

```


```{r}
List_of_species<-readRDS(paste0(path,"/output/Species_List_with_genome_and_cl_info2.rds")) %>% 
  select(species,genus,order)

List_of_samples<-readRDS(paste0(path,"/output/Sample_List_all_species_clean.rds")) %>% 
  left_join(List_of_species) %>% 
  filter(order=="Primates") %>% 
  filter(cell_type=="Fibro") %>% 
  group_by(species,genus) %>% 
  summarise(no_individuals=n())


  ggplot(List_of_samples)+
  geom_col(aes(reorder(species,no_individuals),no_individuals,fill=genus))+
    coord_flip()+
    scale_fill_viridis_d()+
    scale_y_continuous(breaks=0:9)+
    ylab("Number of Fibroblast lines")+
    xlab("")




```
